seoTitle: Franklyn vs Frayville — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Franklyn and Frayville. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Franklyn and Frayville.
heading: Franklyn vs Frayville — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Franklyn, South Australia and Frayville, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Franklyn has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Frayville (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Franklyn or Frayville safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Franklyn has a flood risk score of 28/100, while Frayville scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Franklyn scores 36/100 for bushfire risk. Frayville scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Franklyn or Frayville?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Franklyn has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
